heading: Your journey to a
bio: I'm Louise Curel, business owner and artistic director at Tiger's Eyes. My goal is to help you feel completely at ease with your semi‑permanent make‑up while creating a beautifully defined version of you. At Tiger's Eyes, I'm passionate about enhancing your natural beauty through tailored microblading that suits your features, style and confidence. Alongside my SPMU work, I also create personalised, framed artwork—unique pieces that have been gifted to loved ones—and I've taken this a step further by recreating these bespoke designs on skin. Take a look at the gallery to explore my work. I'm committed to offering personalised, high‑quality services that help you express your individuality. With a focus on artistry, precision and a welcoming atmosphere, I make sure every client feels comfortable from the moment they walk in. Join me on your journey to a stunning new look.

creds.title: Design & Education
creds.text: With a bachelor's degree in design from the University of Wolverhampton, Louise continued to achieve further teaching and management qualifications enabling a successful 25 year career helping others develop and actualise their own concepts.

creds.title: CPD Accredited Microblading
creds.text: Louise became a Microblading Artist having trained at Blades Academy in Walsall in the heart of the West Midlands achieving CPD accredited certification in the latest 'Nano' blading techniques.

creds.title: Advanced Tattoo Diploma
creds.text: Following this Louise developed her passion for Art and Design further and completed Premium Master Classes at VEAN Tattoo Academy in Wolverhampton achieving her Diploma in the Advanced Course.

creds.title: Rebuilding Confidence
creds.text: Louise is currently working with Design-Innovation in London developing a concept idea designed to re-build ladies' self-confidence and self-worth and who have been in receipt of the Hartmann's procedure.
